state.next-action: 2026-04-19 sweep C (diff-noise full audit, follow-up to sweep B): operator asked "anything else that hiccups our diffs similarly... a lot of our logs from differing agents will cause diff and merge conflict issues." Audited vendor/.gitignore vs `git log --since=60d --name-only` churn — found 1,800+ commits/60d of pure noise across 71 files in two tiers, none of which any consumer needs committed. Tier 1 (append-only logs + per-agent state, 40 files): .planning/.trace-events.jsonl (95 commits), .planning/.trace-seq (95), .planning/.gad-log/*.jsonl (5 daily files, ~85 commits), .planning/sessions/s-*.json (33 per-agent session files). Tier 2 (deterministic site-build outputs from `npm run prebuild`, 31 files): site/lib/*.generated.{ts,json} (5 files, 150 commits), site/data/*.json (12 files, 69 commits), site/public/llms{,-full}.txt + site/public/api/docs.json (3 files, 147 commits), site/public/downloads/*.zip + downloads/planning/*.zip (11 files, 1,242 commits — requirements/*.{xml,md} preserved, those are source). All entries added to vendor/.gitignore with header documenting source/regen pipeline + which build script reads them. `git rm --cached` 71 files. site/scripts/pack-site-release.cjs gains warnIfTraceMissing() — non-fatal log when packaging from a fresh clone with no local trace history (self-eval ships as empty stub, which is fine for CLI-only contributors). Build pipeline impact: zero — build-site-data.mjs writes all Tier 2 paths via `predev`/`prebuild` on first `npm run dev` or `npm run build`; compute-self-eval.mjs already degrades gracefully when trace inputs missing. Net effect: ~70% reduction in vendor diff churn, kills the dominant multi-agent merge-conflict surface (sessions/, trace, generated/, downloads/). No source data lost — templates/, evals/, docs/, .planning/*.xml all stay tracked. Planning note: `.planning/notes/2026-04-19-diff-noise-sweep.md`. Earlier today (sweep B): .planning/graph.{json,html} now gitignored — operator surfaced the constant-diff-noise problem. Tracked copies removed via `git rm --cached`. bin/gad.cjs gains `ensureGraphFresh(baseDir, root)` helper that delegates to graphExtractor.loadOrBuildGraph for staleness check (TASK-REGISTRY/ROADMAP/DECISIONS mtimes) and writes graph.html alongside when rebuilt. Wired into snapshotV2Cmd + startupCmd post-projectid-resolution. Both guard on !sideEffectsSuppressed(). Smoke verified: rm both → snapshot prints "[snapshot] graph cache rebuilt (missing)" + writes both; touch TASK-REGISTRY.xml → next snapshot prints "(stale)"; subsequent snapshot silent (fresh). site/scripts/pack-site-release.cjs gains ensureFrameworkGraph() that runs `node bin/gad.cjs graph build --projectid get-anything-done` before staging if .planning/graph.json missing — keeps site/data/planning-graph.json (baked into release zip) from shipping as empty stub on fresh checkout. site/data/planning-graph.json itself remains tracked (separate site-data convention). 63-graph-task-stale resolution extended with full 2026-04-19 strengthening narrative. README.txt in pack-site-release updated to surface launcher-<platform>-<arch>.exe variants and demote portable-Node hint (44-34 cancelled). 2026-04-19 sweep A (earlier today): 44-34 CANCELLED (operator decision) — portable-Node bootstrap superseded by Bun-compiled launcher.exe; bin/install.js cleaned up (`installPortableNodeStub` removed; `--node` flag now prints deprecation notice + no-op for one release window; help block demoted `--node` to dim/deprecated row). 44-32 follow-ups landed: (e) interactive feature picker `promptFeatures` shipped — no-flag invocation asks {planning, site, skills, all} with multi-select; skills-branch chains into existing promptRuntime+promptLocation. (tests) dedicated `tests/installer-feature-flags.test.cjs` shipped — 7/7 pass covering --help surface, --planning scaffold + idempotent + projectid derivation, --site graceful warn, --node deprecated no-op, combined --planning --site. 44-33 follow-ups landed: (c-bun) launcher.cjs refactored to dual-mode (Node-subprocess default; in-process require under Bun-compile detected via `typeof Bun !== "undefined"`; `GAD_LAUNCHER_FORCE_SPAWN=1` escape hatch). pack-site-release.cjs detects `bun` on PATH and runs `bun build --compile --target=<host>` (or `GAD_LAUNCHER_TARGETS=bun-windows-x64,bun-linux-x64,bun-darwin-x64` for cross-target) producing `launcher-<platform>-<arch>.exe` alongside launcher.cjs (failure non-fatal — Node-shim still ships). Smoke-verified: `bun build --compile site/scripts/launcher.cjs` produces a 111 MB self-contained .exe that runs and prints the correct missing-server.js error. (guard) `scripts/publish-release.mjs` extended with `ensureSiteZipIfRequired()` — fails publish if `site-v<tag>.zip` missing from `dist/release/`; opt-out via `GAD_SKIP_SITE_ZIP_GUARD=1` for CLI-only patch releases. Test coverage in tests/release-deprecation.test.cjs (artifact recognition + guard throw + skip-env). Tests overall: 23/23 across installer-feature-flags + release-deprecation + consumer-init-install. References/installer-feature-flags.md fully rewritten for the post-44-34 surface; "Cancelled (44-34)" + "Interactive picker" sections added; "Tests" table reflects shipped coverage. Planning note: `.planning/notes/2026-04-19-44-28-spine-second-cut.md`. Remaining 44-28 deferred follow-ups (carved into umbrella, not standalone tasks yet): 44-33c-ci (cross-compile launcher.exe in CI for all 3 platforms), 44-33c-verify (live runtime test of launcher.exe against real Next standalone build), 44-32-cleanup (remove --node flag entirely after one release deprecation window). Planned queue (graph rebuild post-changes): just GAD-T-44-28 (umbrella, awaiting CI cross-compile + live verify). 35-10 already closed earlier. Next: queue genuinely empty save the umbrella — operator picks the next thread.
